highlights.text: Reduction in response time — 8+ Spring Boot microservices for real-time network monitoring and fault management.
Test coverage increase from 150+ unit and integration tests, catching 25+ critical bugs pre-production.
Startup performance improvement with non-blocking Spring WebFlux and Reactor microservices under peak loads.

cases.title: Full Stack Job Portal
cases.problem: Recruiters and applicants need one place to manage job listings and applications — with different capabilities for each role and secure access to sensitive data.
did: Built a full-stack job portal with Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, Spring Security, and JPA.
Recruiters can create job listings and view applicants; applicants can apply for open positions and track their applications.
Implemented secure user authentication and role-based access control.
Dynamic content rendering with Thymeleaf; persistent storage with Spring Data JPA and MySQL.
cases.result: A working portal where both sides of the hiring process — recruiters and applicants — manage their workflows in one secure, role-aware application.
